prompt:
Square 1:1 illustration. The ENTIRE canvas must be filled with one flat solid background color exactly #ebf5ec (light mint green — same as Neotoma “agentic systems builders” ICP card on neotoma.io). No gradients, vignettes, noise, or second background hue.

Match the Neotoma ICP option-B card illustration style (reference: site asset icp-option-b-builders): extremely muted near-monochrome palette within the green family — shape fills slightly lighter or darker than #ebf5ec but still whisper-soft; outline strokes in one consistent medium desaturated grey-green; optional tiny accent fills (e.g. dot eyes, small icon chips) in muted emerald-teal. All outlines use ONE uniform stroke weight (no thick-thin calligraphy). Every rectangle uses large rounded corners. Interiors are flat solid fills only — no shadows, inner glows, gradients, or highlights.

COMPOSITION (required): two-tier diagram. TOP: a horizontal row of exactly 2 or 3 rounded-square “container” frames, each holding a simple symbolic icon (not realistic, not a photo). BOTTOM: one wider rounded rectangle or rounded-square “output” element. Between them: bold dashed connector lines (long dash segments) running from each top container downward, merging toward a small solid triangular arrowhead that points into the bottom element — same connector grammar as an infographic.

No text, letters, numbers, watermarks, or UI labels. Keep the motif centered with generous margin (~15–20% padding on all sides).

Symbolic content for this guarantee: Top row: two rounded-square frames, each containing the same simple document or tablet icon (identical twins). Bottom: one wider rounded rectangle with a small balance-scale icon (equal pans). Dashed lines from both top frames converge to an arrow into the bottom block — same inputs, same outcome.
